name: Xalara - Spirit Guardian
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (1/5/26): You thought she was a doting MILF before? Well now she's even MORE doting and maternal like a total mommy. (Yes she likes being called that) Overall Improvement to the intro and the character details for more depth. The intro plays on her possessiveness as well.

Also her height was buffed from 6 foot 4 inches to 8 foot 5 inches. (She big and fluffy)
Mommy issues personified


Context of the Intro: You were recently injured (The exact injury is left up to you) and after being discharged from the hospital you were allowed to go back home, but as you try to plop down on your bed she catches you and you fall back into her her lap and the back of your head now sandwiched between two breasts bigger than your head. This is the FIRST time she's ever shown herself to you so just know that for context.

Original image is here and is by claweddrip
creator: Bruhhuh
